---
title: "causal-inference-examples"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stargazer)

tb <- tibble(
  female = ifelse(runif(10000)>=0.5,1,0),
  ability = rnorm(10000),
  discrimination = female,
  occupation = 1 + 2*ability + 0*female - 2*discrimination + rnorm(10000),
  wage = 1 - 1*discrimination + 1*occupation + 2*ability + rnorm(10000) 
)


# wage = 1 - 1*discrimination + 1*occupation + 2*ability + rnorm(10000) 
# wage = 1 - 1*female + 1*(1 + 2*ability - 2*female + rnorm(10000)) + 2*ability + rnorm(10000) 
# wage = 1 - 1*female + 1 + 2*ability - 2*female + rnorm(10000) + 2*ability + rnorm(10000) 
# wage = 1 - 3*female + 1 + 4*ability  + rnorm(10000) + rnorm(10000) 
# wage = 2 - 3*female + 4*ability + 2rnorm(10000)


lm_2 <- lm(wage ~ female + occupation, tb)
lm_3 <- lm(wage ~ female + occupation + ability, tb)
lm_1 <- lm(wage ~ female, tb)
lm_4 <- lm(wage ~ female + ability, tb)

stargazer(lm_1,lm_2,lm_3, lm_4, type = "text", 
          column.labels = c("Biased Unconditional", 
                            "Biased",
                            "Unbiased Conditional", 
                            "original"))
```
